Steps to bake a cake

  1. Preheat the oven
  2. mix the dry ingredents
  3. whisk the milk,milk powder
  4. combine wet and dry ingredients
  5. pour the batter into the pan and bake for 30 minutes

ingredents

  • milk
  • milk powder
  • water
  • butter

programming language

python
a high level interpreted programming language know for its ease of use
java
a high level programming language
